summary: Two deviations found: a missing null check and a stale doc comment.

findings.evidence: pkg/example/handler.go:42 dereferences req.User without a prior nil check
findings.suggestedFix: Add `if req.User == nil { return ErrMissingUser }` before the dereference at line 42

findings.evidence: pkg/example/handler.go:10 doc comment still references the removed Legacy field
findings.suggestedFix: Update the doc comment to describe the current field set
